summary: A rough, often out‑of‑sync show with a few bright spots (Peggy‑O, Ship of Fools, Gimme Some, Watchtower) and an UltraMatrix matrix recording of unknown quality.
review: The reviewer found the 10/18/89 performance generally uneven, describing the band as “extremely out of sync” for most of the night. A handful of songs – notably Peggy‑O, Ship of Fools, Gimme Some and Watchtower – were highlighted as good to better moments, and Brent Mydland’s occasional front‑man attempts earned a nod. No specific comments on the recording quality were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, giving a moderate 3‑star rating and noting both performance flaws and some song highlights; recording quality not addressed.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound clarity or mix; UltraMatrix suggests a matrix source but its quality cannot be assessed from the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall set felt out of sync, though occasional tighter, leaner moments were noted; pacing suffered by the lack of cohesion.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland shows his front‑man side and has some strong moments.
